title: University of Southampton Delhi Campus Tour Event Details
text: Campus tour 20 November Event Status: Book Now Date & Time: November 20, 2025 3:00 PM IST Location: International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India Book now Campus tour Join us for an exciting in-person event at University of Southampton Delhi where you can explore our state-of-the-art facilities and get a feel for campus life. This is your chance to experience first-hand what it’s like to be a part of our vibrant community. Don’t miss out on this opportunity to discover all that the University of Southampton has to offer. International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India Open address in Google Maps
summary: Join an in-person campus tour at University of Southampton Delhi on November 20, 2025, to explore facilities and experience campus life at International Tech Park Gurgaon.
